title: Vanilla Bushport
description: Vanilla Tweaks 3D Bushes option for the Vanilla Backport mod.
body:
**Credits to the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/about) team for the models, and huge thanks to the [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) Devs for the amazing mod!**

Created for the Vanilla Backport mod backporting the Spring to Life update. The Vanilla Tweaks website added an option to use a 3D model for the regular and sweet berry bush, however due to resource pack formatting changes between 1.21.1 and 1.21.5, the Vanilla Tweaks 3D bush option is not compatible with the Vanilla Backport mod. This resource pack aims to fix this issue by backporting the format of the models and textures, allowing bushes to stand proud in their full 3D bushy glory.

_Alternatively, it works as a regular 3D bushes pack too!_
